{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012Se7bbCQoSU6dW9yYiShwF","type":"tool_result","content":"{\"content\":\"1: # SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Florian Bruhin (The Compiler) <mail@qutebrowser.org>\\n2: #\\n3: # SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later\\n4: \\n5: \\\"\\\"\\\"Get darkmode arguments to pass to Qt.\\n6: \\n7: Overview of blink setting names based on the Qt version:\\n8: \\n9: Qt 5.10 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n10: ---------------------\\n11: \\n12: First implementation, called \\\"high contrast mode\\\".\\n13: \\n14: - highContrastMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness)\\n15: - highContrastGrayscale (bool)\\n16: - highContrastContrast (float)\\n17: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone)\\n18: \\n19: Qt 5.11, 5.12, 5.13 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n20: ---------------------------------\\n21: \\n22: New \\\"smart\\\" image policy.\\n23: \\n24: - Mode/Grayscale/Contrast as above\\n25: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart [new!])\\n26: \\n27: Qt 5.14 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n28: ---------------------\\n29: \\n30: Renamed to \\\"darkMode\\\".\\n31: \\n32: - darkMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness/\\n33:             kInvertLightnessLAB [new!])\\n34: - darkModeGrayscale (bool)\\n35: - darkModeContrast (float)\\n36: - darkModeImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart)\\n37: - darkModePagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterByBackground) [new!]\\n38: - darkModeTextBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\\n39: - darkModeBackgroundBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\\n40: - darkModeImageGrayscale (float) [new!]\\n41: \\n42: Qt 5.15.0 and 5.15.1 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n43: ----------------------------------\\n44: \\n45: \\\"darkMode\\\" split into \\\"darkModeEnabled\\\" and \\\"darkModeInversionAlgorithm\\\".\\n46: \\n47: - darkModeEnabled (bool) [new!]\\n48: - darkModeInversionAlgorithm (kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/\\n49:                                 kInvertLightness/kInvertLightnessLAB)\\n50: - Rest (except darkMode) as above.\\n51: - NOTE: smart image policy is broken with Qt 5.15.0!\\n52: \\n53: Qt 5.15.2\\n54: ---------\\n55: \\n56: Prefix changed to \\\"forceDarkMode\\\".\\n57: \\n58: - As with Qt 5.15.0 / .1, but with \\\"forceDarkMode\\\" as prefix.\\n59: \\n60: Qt 5.15.3\\n61: ---------\\n62: \\n63: Settings split to new --dark-mode-settings switch:\\n64: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2390588\\n65: \\n66: - Everything except forceDarkModeEnabled goes to the other switch.\\n67: - Algorithm uses a different enum with kOff gone.\\n68: - No \\\"forceDarkMode\\\" prefix anymore.\\n69: \\n70: Removed DarkModePagePolicy:\\n71: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2323441\\n72: \\n73: \\\"prefers color scheme dark\\\" changed enum values:\\n74: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2232922\\n75: \\n76: - Now needs to be 0 for dark and 1 for light\\n77:   (before: 0 no preference / 1 dark / 2 light)\\n78: \\n79: Qt 6.2\\n80: ------\\n81: \\n82: No significant changes over 5.15.3\\n83: \\n84: Qt 6.3\\n85: ------\\n86: \\n87: - New IncreaseTextContrast:\\n88: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2893236\\n89: \\n90: Qt 6.4\\n91: ------\\n92: \\n93: - Renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\\n94: \\n95:   \\\"Correct brightness threshold of darkmode color classifier\\\"\\n96:   https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\\n97: \\n98:   \\\"Rename text_classifier to foreground_classifier\\\"\\n99:   https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3226389\\n100: \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n101: \\n102: import os\\n103: import copy\\n104: import enum\\n105: import dataclasses\\n106: import collections\\n107: from typing import (Any, Iterator, Mapping, MutableMapping, Optional, Set, Tuple, Union,\\n108:                     Sequence, List)\\n109: \\n110: from qutebrowser.config import config\\n111: from qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, utils, log, version\\n112: \\n113: \\n114: _BLINK_SETTINGS = 'blink-settings'\\n115: \\n116: \\n117: class Variant(enum.Enum):\\n118: \\n119:     \\\"\\\"\\\"A dark mode variant.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n120: \\n121:     qt_515_2 = enum.auto()\\n122:     qt_515_3 = enum.auto()\\n123:     qt_63 = enum.auto()\\n124:     qt_64 = enum.auto()\\n125: \\n126: \\n127: # Mapping from a colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm setting value to\\n128: # Chromium's DarkModeInversionAlgorithm enum values.\\n129: _ALGORITHMS = {\\n130:     # 0: kOff (not exposed)\\n131:     # 1: kSimpleInvertForTesting (not exposed)\\n132:     'brightness-rgb': 2,  # kInvertBrightness\\n133:     'lightness-hsl': 3,  # kInvertLightness\\n134:     'lightness-cielab': 4,  # kInvertLightnessLAB\\n135: }\\n136: # Qt >= 5.15.3, based on dark_mode_settings.h\\n137: _ALGORITHMS_NEW = {\\n138:     # 0: kSimpleInvertForTesting (not exposed)\\n139:     'brightness-rgb': 1,  # kInvertBrightness\\n140:     'lightness-hsl': 2,  # kInvertLightness\\n141:     'lightness-cielab': 3,  # kInvertLightnessLAB\\n142: }\\n143: \\n144: # Mapping from a colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images setting value to\\n145: # Chromium's DarkModeImagePolicy enum values.\\n146: # Values line up with dark_mode_settings.h for 5.15.3+.\\n147: _IMAGE_POLICIES = {\\n148:     'always': 0,  # kFilterAll\\n149:     'never': 1,  # kFilterNone\\n150:     'smart': 2,  # kFilterSmart\\n151: }\\n152: \\n153: # Mapping from a colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.page setting value to\\n154: # Chromium's DarkModePagePolicy enum values.\\n155: _PAGE_POLICIES = {\\n156:     'always': 0,  # kFilterAll\\n157:     'smart': 1,  # kFilterByBackground\\n158: }\\n159: \\n160: _BOOLS = {\\n161:     True: 'true',\\n162:     False: 'false',\\n163: }\\n164: \\n165: _INT_BOOLS = {\\n166:     True: '1',\\n167:     False: '0',\\n168: }\\n169: \\n170: \\n171: @dataclasses.dataclass\\n172: class _Setting:\\n173: \\n174:     \\\"\\\"\\\"A single dark mode setting.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n175: \\n176:     option: str\\n177:     chromium_key: str\\n178:     mapping: Optional[Mapping[Any, Union[str, int]]] = None\\n179: \\n180:     def _value_str(self, value: Any) -> str:\\n181:         if self.mapping is None:\\n182:             return str(value)\\n183:         return str(self.mapping[value])\\n184: \\n185:     def chromium_tuple(self, value: Any) -> Tuple[str, str]:\\n186:         return self.chromium_key, self._value_str(value)\\n187: \\n188:     def with_prefix(self, prefix: str) -> '_Setting':\\n189:         return _Setting(\\n190:             option=self.option,\\n191:             chromium_key=prefix + self.chromium_key,\\n192:             mapping=self.mapping,\\n193:         )\\n194: \\n195: \\n196: class _Definition:\\n197: \\n198:     \\\"\\\"\\\"A collection of dark mode setting names for the given QtWebEngine version.\\n199: \\n200:     Attributes:\\n201:         _settings: A list of _Setting objects for this definition.\\n202:         mandatory: A set of settings which should always be passed to Chromium, even if\\n203:                    not customized from the default.\\n204:         prefix: A string prefix to add to all Chromium setting names.\\n205:         switch_names: A dict mapping option names to the Chromium switch they belong to.\\n206:                       None is used as fallback key, i.e. for settings not in the dict.\\n207:     \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n208: \\n209:     def __init__(\\n210:             self,\\n211:             *args: _Setting,\\n212:             mandatory: Set[str],\\n213:             prefix: str,\\n214:             switch_names: Mapping[Optional[str], str] = None,\\n215:     ) -> None:\\n216:         self._settings = args\\n217:         self.mandatory = mandatory\\n218:         self.prefix = prefix\\n219: \\n220:         if switch_names is not None:\\n221:             self._switch_names = switch_names\\n222:         else:\\n223:             self._switch_names = {None: _BLINK_SETTINGS}\\n224: \\n225:     def prefixed_settings(self) -> Iterator[Tuple[str, _Setting]]:\\n226:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Get all \\\"prepared\\\" settings.\\n227: \\n228:         Yields tuples which contain the Chromium setting key (e.g. 'blink-settings' or\\n229:         'dark-mode-settings') and the corresponding _Settings object.\\n230:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n231:         for setting in self._settings:\\n232:             switch = self._switch_names.get(setting.option, self._switch_names[None])\\n233:             yield switch, setting.with_prefix(self.prefix)\\n234: \\n235:     def copy_with(self, attr: str, value: Any) -> '_Definition':\\n236:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Get a new _Definition object with a changed attribute.\\n237: \\n238:         NOTE: This does *not* copy the settings list. Both objects will reference the\\n239:         same (immutable) tuple.\\n240:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n241:         new = copy.copy(self)\\n242:         setattr(new, attr, value)\\n243:         return new\\n244: \\n245:     def copy_add_setting(self, setting: _Setting) -> '_Definition':\\n246:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Get a new _Definition object with an additional setting.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n247:         new = copy.copy(self)\\n248:         new._settings = self._settings + (setting,)  # pylint: disable=protected-access\\n249:         return new\\n250: \\n251:     def copy_replace_setting(self, option: str, chromium_key: str) -> '_Definition':\\n252:         \\\"\\\"\\\"Get a new _Definition object with `old` replaced by `new`.\\n253: \\n254:         If `old` is not in the settings list, return the old _Definition object.\\n255:         \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n256:         new = copy.deepcopy(self)\\n257: \\n258:         for setting in new._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\\n259:             if setting.option == option:\\n260:                 setting.chromium_key = chromium_key\\n261:                 return new\\n262: \\n263:         raise ValueError(f\\\"Setting {option} not found in {self}\\\")\\n264: \\n265: \\n266: # Our defaults for policy.images are different from Chromium's, so we mark it as\\n267: # mandatory setting.\\n268: \\n269: _DEFINITIONS: MutableMapping[Variant, \\n7: Overview of blink setting names based on the Qt version:\\n8: \\n9: Qt 5.10 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n10: ---------------------\\n11: \\n12: First implementation, called \\\"high contrast mode\\\".\\n13: \\n14: - highContrastMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness)\\n15: - highContrastGrayscale (bool)\\n16: - highContrastContrast (float)\\n17: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone)\\n18: \\n19: Qt 5.11, 5.12, 5.13 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n20: ---------------------------------\\n21: \\n22: New \\\"smart\\\" image policy.\\n23: \\n24: - Mode/Grayscale/Contrast as above\\n25: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart [new!])\\n26: \\n27: Qt 5.14 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n28: ---------------------\\n29: \\n30: Renamed to \\\"darkMode\\\".\\n31: \\n32: - darkMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness/\\n33:             kInvertLightnessLAB [new!])\\n34: - darkModeGrayscale (bool)\\n35: - darkModeContrast (float)\\n36: - darkModeImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart)\\n37: - darkModePagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterByBackground) [new!]\\n38: - darkModeTextBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\\n39: - darkModeBackgroundBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\\n40: - darkModeImageGrayscale (float) [new!]\\n41: \\n42: Qt 5.15.0 and 5.15.1 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n43: ----------------------------------\\n44: \\n45: \\\"darkMode\\\" split into \\\"darkModeEnabled\\\" and \\\"darkModeInversionAlgorithm\\\".\\n46: \\n47: - darkModeEnabled (bool) [new!]\\n48: - darkModeInversionAlgorithm (kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/\\n49:                                 kInvertLightness/kInvertLightnessLAB)\\n50: - Rest (except darkMode) as above.\\n51: - NOTE: smart image policy is broken with Qt 5.15.0!\\n52: \\n53: Qt 5.15.2\\n54: ---------\\n55: \\n56: Prefix changed to \\\"forceDarkMode\\\".\\n57: \\n58: - As with Qt 5.15.0 / .1, but with \\\"forceDarkMode\\\" as prefix.\\n59: \\n60: Qt 5.15.3\\n61: ---------\\n62: \\n63: Settings split to new --dark-mode-settings switch:\\n64: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2390588\\n65: \\n66: - Everything except forceDarkModeEnabled goes to the other switch.\\n67: - Algorithm uses a different enum with kOff gone.\\n68: - No \\\"forceDarkMode\\\" prefix anymore.\\n69: \\n70: Removed DarkModePagePolicy:\\n71: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2323441\\n72: \\n73: \\\"prefers color scheme dark\\\" changed enum values:\\n74: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2232922\\n75: \\n76: - Now needs to be 0 for dark and 1 for light\\n77:   (before: 0 no preference / 1 dark / 2 light)\\n78: \\n79: Qt 6.2\\n80: ------\\n81: \\n82: No significant changes over 5.15.3\\n83: \\n84: Qt 6.3\\n85: ------\\n86: \\n87: - New IncreaseTextContrast:\\n88: # SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Florian Bruhin (The Compiler) <mail@qutebrowser.org>\n2: #\n3: # SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later\n4: \n5: \"\"\"Get darkmode arguments to pass to Qt.\n6: \n7: Overview of blink setting names based on the Qt version:\n8: \n9: Qt 5.10 (UNSUPPORTED)\n10: ---------------------\n11: \n12: First implementation, called \"high contrast mode\".\n13: \n14: - highContrastMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness)\n15: - highContrastGrayscale (bool)\n16: - highContrastContrast (float)\n17: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone)\n18: \n19: Qt 5.11, 5.12, 5.13 (UNSUPPORTED)\n20: ---------------------------------\n21: \n22: New \"smart\" image policy.\n23: \n24: - Mode/Grayscale/Contrast as above\n25: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart [new!])\n26: \n27: Qt 5.14 (UNSUPPORTED)\n28: ---------------------\n29: \n30: Renamed to \"darkMode\".\n31: \n32: - darkMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness/\n33:             kInvertLightnessLAB [new!])\n34: - darkModeGrayscale (bool)\n35: - darkModeContrast (float)\n36: - darkModeImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart)\n37: - darkModePagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterByBackground) [new!]\n38: - darkModeTextBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\n39: - darkModeBackgroundBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\n40: - darkModeImageGrayscale (float) [new!]\n41: \n42: Qt 5.15.0 and 5.15.1 (UNSUPPORTED)\n43: ----------------------------------\n44: \n45: \"darkMode\" split into \"darkModeEnabled\" and \"darkModeInversionAlgorithm\".\n46: \n47: - darkModeEnabled (bool) [new!]\n48: - darkModeInversionAlgorithm (kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/\n49:                                 kInvertLightness/kInvertLightnessLAB)\n50: - Rest (except darkMode) as above.\n51: - NOTE: smart image policy is broken with Qt 5.15.0!\n52: \n53: Qt 5.15.2\n54: ---------\n55: \n56: Prefix changed to \"forceDarkMode\".\n57: \n58: - As with Qt 5.15.0 / .1, but with \"forceDarkMode\" as prefix.\n59: \n60: Qt 5.15.3\n61: ---------\n62: \n63: Settings split to new --dark-mode-settings switch:\n64: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2390588\n65: \n66: - Everything except forceDarkModeEnabled goes to the other switch.\n67: - Algorithm uses a different enum with kOff gone.\n68: - No \"forceDarkMode\" prefix anymore.\n69: \n70: Removed DarkModePagePolicy:\n71: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2323441\n72: \n73: \"prefers color scheme dark\" changed enum values:\n74: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2232922\n75: \n76: - Now needs to be 0 for dark and 1 for light\n77:   (before: 0 no preference / 1 dark / 2 light)\n78: \n79: Qt 6.2\n80: ------\n81: \n82: No significant changes over 5.15.3\n83: \n84: Qt 6.3\n85: ------\n86: \n87: - New IncreaseTextContrast:\n88: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2893236\n89: \n90: Qt 6.4\n91: ------\n92: \n93: - Renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n94: \n95:   \"Correct brightness threshold of darkmode color classifier\"\n96: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3226389\n100: \"\"\"\n101: \n102: import os\n103: import copy\n104: import enum\n105: import dataclasses\n106: import collections\n107: from enum values.\n155: _PAGE_POLICIES = {\n156:     'always': 0,  # kFilterAll\n157:     'smart': 1,  # kFilterByBackground\n158: }\n159: \n160: _BOOLS = {\n161:     True: 'true',\n162:     False: prefixed_settings(self) -> Iterator[Tuple[str, _Setting]]:\n226:         \"\"\"Get all \"prepared\" settings.\n227: \n228:         Yields tuples which contain the Chromium setting key (e.g. 'blink-settings' or\n229:         'dark-mode-settings') and the corresponding _Settings object.\n230:         \"\"\"\n231:         for setting in self._settings:\n232:             switch = self._switch_names.get(setting.option, self._switch_names[None])\n233:             yield switch, setting.with_prefix(self.prefix)\n234: \n235:     def copy_with(self, attr: str, value: Any) -> '_Definition':\n236:         \"\"\"Get a new _Definition object with a changed attribute.\n237: \n238:         NOTE: This does *not* copy the settings list. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_014CCGpQNzLmRnHirm93CVaY","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01K41CATb1QjeCmXRUYGvZd1","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/regression_test.py","content":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test verifies that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting\nis correctly configured for Qt 6.4, where Chromium renamed the property from\n'TextBrightnessThreshold' to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n\nThe bug: On Qt 6.4, the threshold.text setting had no effect because the code was\nstill using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the new\n'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\nfrom typing import Mapping, Sequence, Tuple\n\n# Add the repo to path for imports\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\nimport pytest\n\n\nclass TestDarkModeTextThresholdQt64:\n    \"\"\"Test that text threshold setting works correctly on Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n\n    def test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n\n        This is a regression test for the bug where the text threshold setting\n        had no effect on Qt 6.4 because the code continued to use the old\n        'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the renamed 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n        \"\"\"\n        # Import here to ensure config_stub is available\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,  # Custom threshold value\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.4 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Verify the settings contain the expected keys\n        assert 'blink-settings' in darkmode_settings\n        assert 'dark-mode-settings' in darkmode_settings\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n\n        # Convert to dict for easier checking\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # The critical check: Qt 6.4 MUST use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold,\n        # not the old TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings, \"\n            f\"but got keys: {list(settings_dict.keys())}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected ForegroundBrightnessThreshold value to be '100', \"\n            f\"got '{settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Make sure the old key is NOT used\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold' \"\n            f\"(this is the bug - it uses old Qt 6.3 key)\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.3 and earlier should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.3 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n    def test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 background threshold should still work (unchanged from Qt 6.3).\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom background threshold\n        config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background', 150)\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Background threshold should still be named BackgroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n    def test_variant_detection_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 is correctly detected as Variant.qt_64.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n\n        assert variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n            f\"Expected Variant.qt_64 for Qt 6.4, got {variant}\"\n        )\n\n    def test_definition_structure_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test the internal definition structure for Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        definition = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n\n        # Find the threshold.text setting\n        threshold_text_setting = None\n        for setting in definition._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                threshold_text_setting = setting\n                break\n\n        assert threshold_text_setting is not None, (\n            \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n        )\n\n        # The chromium key should be ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 threshold.text setting has wrong chromium_key: \"\n            f\"'{threshold_text_setting.chromium_key}' \"\n            f\"(expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt64_vs_qt63_difference(self):\n        \"\"\"Verify that Qt 6.4 definition differs from Qt 6.3 in threshold.text key.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.3\n        qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n        qt63_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt63_def._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt63_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.4\n        qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n        qt64_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt64_def._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt64_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        assert qt63_threshold is not None and qt64_threshold is not None\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold, got {qt63_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt64_threshold.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, got {qt64_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_015cQmcDMekH89TXMikUZziE","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0189n3PnimudoggLGeY5PT2h","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/workspace/regression_test.py","content":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test verifies that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting\nis correctly configured for Qt 6.4, where Chromium renamed the property from\n'TextBrightnessThreshold' to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n\nThe bug: On Qt 6.4, the threshold.text setting had no effect because the code was\nstill using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the new\n'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\nfrom typing import Mapping, Sequence, Tuple\n\n# Add the repo to path for imports\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\nimport pytest\n\n\nclass TestDarkModeTextThresholdQt64:\n    \"\"\"Test that text threshold setting works correctly on Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n\n    def test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n\n        This is a regression test for the bug where the text threshold setting\n        had no effect on Qt 6.4 because the code continued to use the old\n        'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the renamed 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n        \"\"\"\n        # Import here to ensure config_stub is available\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,  # Custom threshold value\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.4 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Verify the settings contain the expected keys\n        assert 'blink-settings' in darkmode_settings\n        assert 'dark-mode-settings' in darkmode_settings\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n\n        # Convert to dict for easier checking\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # The critical check: Qt 6.4 MUST use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold,\n        # not the old TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings, \"\n            f\"but got keys: {list(settings_dict.keys())}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected ForegroundBrightnessThreshold value to be '100', \"\n            f\"got '{settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Make sure the old key is NOT used\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold' \"\n            f\"(this is the bug - it uses old Qt 6.3 key)\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.3 and earlier should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.3 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n    def test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 background threshold should still work (unchanged from Qt 6.3).\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom background threshold\n        config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background', 150)\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Background threshold should still be named BackgroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n    def test_variant_detection_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 is correctly detected as Variant.qt_64.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n\n        assert variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n            f\"Expected Variant.qt_64 for Qt 6.4, got {variant}\"\n        )\n\n    def test_definition_structure_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test the internal definition structure for Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        definition = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n\n        # Find the threshold.text setting\n        threshold_text_setting = None\n        for setting in definition._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                threshold_text_setting = setting\n                break\n\n        assert threshold_text_setting is not None, (\n            \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n        )\n\n        # The chromium key should be ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 threshold.text setting has wrong chromium_key: \"\n            f\"'{threshold_text_setting.chromium_key}' \"\n            f\"(expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt64_vs_qt63_difference(self):\n        \"\"\"Verify that Qt 6.4 definition differs from Qt 6.3 in threshold.text key.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.3\n        qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n        qt63_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt63_def._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt63_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.4\n        qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n        qt64_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt64_def._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt64_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        assert qt63_threshold is not None and qt64_threshold is not None\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold, got {qt63_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt64_threshold.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, got {qt64_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # They should be different (this is the bug if they're the same)\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key != qt64_threshold.chromium_key, (\n            \"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 threshold.text keys should differ \"\n            \"(bug: copy_replace_setting didn't work)\"\n        )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":11,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1017,"cache_read_input_tokens":62685,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1017},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"41ff018a-e833-49f3-98b7-32b82b08affb"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_019uP9ePAUNRMUEMRALapVNC","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0158i3hwkHhxcrK51agGSfVU","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/tmp/regression_test.py","content":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test verifies that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting\nis correctly configured for Qt 6.4, where Chromium renamed the property from\n'TextBrightnessThreshold' to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n\nThe bug: On Qt 6.4, the threshold.text setting had no effect because the code was\nstill using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the new\n'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\nfrom typing import Mapping, Sequence, Tuple\n\n# Add the repo to path for imports\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\nimport pytest\n\n\nclass TestDarkModeTextThresholdQt64:\n    \"\"\"Test that text threshold setting works correctly on Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n\n    def test_qt64_uses_foreground_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n\n        This is a regression test for the bug where the text threshold setting\n        had no effect on Qt 6.4 because the code continued to use the old\n        'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the renamed 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n        \"\"\"\n        # Import here to ensure config_stub is available\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,  # Custom threshold value\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.4 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Verify the settings contain the expected keys\n        assert 'blink-settings' in darkmode_settings\n        assert 'dark-mode-settings' in darkmode_settings\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n\n        # Convert to dict for easier checking\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # The critical check: Qt 6.4 MUST use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold,\n        # not the old TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings, \"\n            f\"but got keys: {list(settings_dict.keys())}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected ForegroundBrightnessThreshold value to be '100', \"\n            f\"got '{settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Make sure the old key is NOT used\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold' \"\n            f\"(this is the bug - it uses old Qt 6.3 key)\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.3 and earlier should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.3 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n    def test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 background threshold should still work (unchanged from Qt 6.3).\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom background threshold\n        config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background', 150)\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Background threshold should still be named BackgroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n    def test_variant_detection_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 is correctly detected as Variant.qt_64.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n\n        assert variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n            f\"Expected Variant.qt_64 for Qt 6.4, got {variant}\"\n        )\n\n    def test_definition_structure_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test the internal definition structure for Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        definition = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n\n        # Find the threshold.text setting\n        threshold_text_setting = None\n        for setting in definition._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                threshold_text_setting = setting\n                break\n\n        assert threshold_text_setting is not None, (\n            \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n        )\n\n        # The chromium key should be ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 threshold.text setting has wrong chromium_key: \"\n            f\"'{threshold_text_setting.chromium_key}' \"\n            f\"(expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt64_vs_qt63_difference(self):\n        \"\"\"Verify that Qt 6.4 definition differs from Qt 6.3 in threshold.text key.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.3\n        qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n        qt63_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt63_def._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt63_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.4\n        qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n        qt64_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt64_def._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt64_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        assert qt63_threshold is not None and qt64_threshold is not None\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold, got {qt63_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt64_threshold.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, got {qt64_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # They should be different (this is the bug if they're the same)\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key != qt64_threshold.chromium_key, (\n            \"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 threshold.text keys should differ \"\n            \"(bug: copy_replace_setting didn't work)\"\n        )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":11,"cache_creation_input_tokens":500,"cache_read_input_tokens":67157,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":500},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"5a34d23c-f2c2-4b3a-acf7-00076a849462"}

Custom threshold value\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.4 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n\n        # Verify the settings contain the expected keys\n        assert 'blink-settings' in darkmode_settings\n        assert 'dark-mode-settings' in darkmode_settings\n\n        # Extract the dark-mode-settings\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n\n        # Convert to dict for easier checking\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # The critical check: Qt 6.4 MUST use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold,\n        # not the old TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings, \"\n            f\"but got keys: {list(settings_dict.keys())}\"\n        )\n\n        # Verify the value is correct\n        assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected ForegroundBrightnessThreshold value to be '100', \"\n            f\"got '{settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}'\"\n        )\n\n        # Make sure the old key is NOT used\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should not use 'TextBrightnessThreshold' \"\n            f\"(this is the bug - it uses old Qt 6.3 key)\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.3 and earlier should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom text threshold\n        settings = {\n            'enabled': True,\n            'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n            'grayscale.all': True,\n            'threshold.text': 100,\n        }\n        for k, v in settings.items():\n            config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n\n        # Create Qt 6.3 version\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n\n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n    def test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged(self, config_stub):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 background threshold should still work (unchanged from Qt 6.3).\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Configure dark mode with custom background threshold\n        config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background', 150)\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        dark_mode_settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_settings_list}\n\n        # Background threshold should still be named BackgroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n\n    def test_variant_detection_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 is correctly detected as Variant.qt_64.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.utils import version\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n\n        assert variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n            f\"Expected Variant.qt_64 for Qt 6.4, got {variant}\"\n        )\n\n    def test_definition_structure_qt64(self):\n        \"\"\"Test the internal definition structure for Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        definition = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n\n        # Find the threshold.text setting\n        threshold_text_setting = None\n        for setting in definition._settings:\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                threshold_text_setting = setting\n                break\n\n        assert threshold_text_setting is not None, (\n            \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n        )\n\n        # The chromium key should be ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 threshold.text setting has wrong chromium_key: \"\n            f\"'{threshold_text_setting.chromium_key}' \"\n            f\"(expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold')\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt64_vs_qt63_difference(self):\n        \"\"\"Verify that Qt 6.4 definition differs from Qt 6.3 in threshold.text key.\"\"\"\n        from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.3\n        qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n        qt63_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt63_def._settings:\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt63_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.4\n        qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n        qt64_threshold = None\n        for setting in qt64_def._settings:\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n                qt64_threshold = setting\n                break\n\n        assert qt63_threshold is not None and qt64_threshold is not None\n\n        # Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold, got {qt63_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n        assert qt64_threshold.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, got {qt64_threshold.chromium_key}\"\n        )\n\n        # They should be different (this is the bug if they're the same)\n        assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key != qt64_threshold.chromium_key, (\n            \"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 threshold.text keys should differ \"\n            \"(bug: copy_replace_setting didn't work)\"\n        )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\nTESTEOF\n","description":"Write regression test to /tmp"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":12,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2765,"cache_read_input_tokens":67657,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2765},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"e22538fd-e089-47c9-b7eb-491e6d191526"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_0124UFfa6CN2bjSTk474uccw","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Xn1ortfHhnygfHjmompruV","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /tmp/regression_test.py << 'TESTEOF'\n\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test verifies that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting\nis correctly configured for Qt 6.4, where Chromium renamed the property from\n'TextBrightnessThreshold' to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n\nThe bug: On Qt 6.4, the threshold.text setting had no effect because the code was\nstill using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key instead of the new\n'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n\n\ndef test_qt64_defines_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 definition should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold not TextBrightnessThreshold.\"\"\"\n    # Get the Qt 6.4 definition\n    qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n    \n    # Find the threshold.text setting\n    threshold_text_setting = None\n    for setting in qt64_def._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            threshold_text_setting = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert threshold_text_setting is not None, (\n        \"threshold.text setting not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n    )\n    \n    # The critical check: Qt 6.4 MUST have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n    assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n        f\"Qt 6.4 threshold.text setting has wrong chromium_key: \"\n        f\"'{threshold_text_setting.chromium_key}' \"\n        f\"(expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', this is the bug if it's 'TextBrightnessThreshold')\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.3 should still use the old TextBrightnessThreshold key.\"\"\"\n    qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n    \n    threshold_text_setting = None\n    for setting in qt63_def._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            threshold_text_setting = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert threshold_text_setting is not None\n    assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold', (\n        f\"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold, got {threshold_text_setting.chromium_key}\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt64_vs_qt63_text_threshold_differs():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 and Qt 6.3 threshold.text settings should have different chromium keys.\"\"\"\n    # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.3\n    qt63_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n    qt63_threshold = None\n    for setting in qt63_def._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            qt63_threshold = setting\n            break\n    \n    # Get threshold.text setting from Qt 6.4\n    qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n    qt64_threshold = None\n    for setting in qt64_def._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            qt64_threshold = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert qt63_threshold is not None and qt64_threshold is not None\n    \n    # They should be different (this is the bug if they're the same)\n    assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key != qt64_threshold.chromium_key, (\n        f\"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 threshold.text keys should differ. \"\n        f\"Qt 6.3: {qt63_threshold.chromium_key}, Qt 6.4: {qt64_threshold.chromium_key}. \"\n        f\"This indicates the copy_replace_setting didn't work correctly (BUG)\"\n    )\n    \n    # Verify the specific keys\n    assert qt63_threshold.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold'\n    assert qt64_threshold.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'\n\n\ndef test_qt64_variant_detected_correctly():\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 is correctly detected as Variant.qt_64.\"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.utils import version\n    \n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n    variant = darkmode._variant(versions)\n    \n    assert variant == darkmode.Variant.qt_64, (\n        f\"Expected Variant.qt_64 for Qt 6.4, got {variant}\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 background threshold should not be changed (only text threshold changed).\"\"\"\n    qt64_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n    \n    threshold_bg_setting = None\n    for setting in qt64_def._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.background':\n            threshold_bg_setting = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert threshold_bg_setting is not None\n    # Background threshold should still be BackgroundBrightnessThreshold\n    assert threshold_bg_setting.chromium_key == 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'\n\n\ndef test_qt515_3_text_threshold_key():\n    \"\"\"Qt 5.15.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold (baseline).\"\"\"\n    qt515_3_def = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_515_3]\n    \n    threshold_text_setting = None\n    for setting in qt515_3_def._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            threshold_text_setting = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert threshold_text_setting is not None\n    assert threshold_text_setting.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold'\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    # Run tests manually for verification\n    test_qt64_defines_foreground_brightness_threshold()\n    print(\"✓ test_qt64_defines_foreground_brightness_threshold passed\")\n    \n    test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold()\n    print(\"✓ test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold passed\")\n    \n    test_qt64_vs_qt63_text_threshold_differs()\n    print(\"✓ test_qt64_vs_qt63_text_threshold_differs passed\")\n    \n    test_qt64_variant_detected_correctly()\n    print(\"✓ test_qt64_variant_detected_correctly passed\")\n    \n    test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged()\n    print(\"✓ test_qt64_background_threshold_unchanged passed\")\n    \n    test_qt515_3_text_threshold_key()\n    print(\"✓ test_qt515_3_text_threshold_key passed\")\n    \n    print(\"\\nAll tests passed!\")\nTESTEOF\n","description":"Write simplified regression test"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":9,"cache_creation_input_tokens":380,"cache_read_input_tokens":80233,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":380},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"dbb40a43-f130-4e7f-846a-39aa0aaac70f"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01VKM1nzPvdsfJWo1DoHiU5y","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DGr36YsDBwe4PuwF9jGpii","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /tmp/regression_test.py << 'TESTEOF'\n\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nTests that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting is \ncorrectly configured for Qt 6.4.\n\nBug Description:\n- Qt 6.4 renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n- The qutebrowser darkmode.py code needs to replace the key when Qt 6.4 is used\n- The copy_replace_setting() method is responsible for this replacement\n- If the bug exists, the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key would still be used on Qt 6.4\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\nimport pytest\nfrom tests.helpers.fixtures import config_stub, configdata_init, patch_backend\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\nfrom qutebrowser.config import configdata\n\n\n@pytest.mark.usefixtures(\"configdata_init\")\nclass TestQt64DarkModeThreshold:\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold.\"\"\"\n\n    def test_qt64_text_threshold_setting_applies(self, config_stub, monkeypatch):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.4 must apply the text threshold setting using ForegroundBrightnessThreshold.\n        \n        This is a regression test for a bug where Qt 6.4 ignored the text threshold\n        setting because it was still using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key\n        instead of the new 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key.\n        \"\"\"\n        # Patch the backend\n        monkeypatch.setattr(objects, 'backend', objects.Backend.QtWebEngine)\n        \n        # Enable dark mode and set custom threshold\n        config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm', 'brightness-rgb')\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all', True)\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 100)\n        \n        # Create Qt 6.4 versions\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n        \n        # Get the dark mode settings that would be passed to Chromium\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        \n        # The settings should be in 'dark-mode-settings' for Qt 5.15.3+\n        assert 'dark-mode-settings' in darkmode_settings, (\n            \"Expected 'dark-mode-settings' key in output for Qt 6.4\"\n        )\n        \n        # Convert to dict for easier checking\n        settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in settings_list}\n        \n        # The bug: Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n            f\"Got keys: {list(settings_dict.keys())}. \"\n            f\"Bug: The copy_replace_setting() method didn't replace the key correctly.\"\n        )\n        \n        assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '100', (\n            f\"Expected threshold value 100, got {settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold']}\"\n        )\n        \n        # Make sure the old key is NOT used (this would indicate the bug)\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n            f\"Qt 6.4 should NOT use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'. \"\n            f\"This is the bug - it means copy_replace_setting() didn't work.\"\n        )\n\n    def test_qt63_text_threshold_setting_unchanged(self, config_stub, monkeypatch):\n        \"\"\"Qt 6.3 must still use the old TextBrightnessThreshold key.\"\"\"\n        # Patch the backend\n        monkeypatch.setattr(objects, 'backend', objects.Backend.QtWebEngine)\n        \n        # Enable dark mode and set custom threshold\n        config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm', 'brightness-rgb')\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 100)\n        \n        # Create Qt 6.3 versions\n        versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n        \n        # Get the dark mode settings\n        darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n        settings_list = darkmode_settings['dark-mode-settings']\n        settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in settings_list}\n        \n        # Qt 6.3 should use TextBrightnessThreshold\n        assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n        assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '100'\n        assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\nTESTEOF\n","description":"Write test using public API and fixtures"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":5,"cache_creation_input_tokens":240,"cache_read_input_tokens":98899,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":240},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"8035e5fb-2ac0-4c0c-99ed-8efee7db41d6"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01LBdAHS9PhLCfzNfpsKWT9E","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01SNqbjKGeeg6J4FGVwDZ88E","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/tests/unit/browser/webengine/test_darkmode_qt64_regression.py << 'TESTEOF'\n\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nTests that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting is \ncorrectly configured for Qt 6.4.\n\nBug Description:\n- Qt 6.4 renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n- The qutebrowser darkmode.py code needs to replace the key when Qt 6.4 is used\n- The copy_replace_setting() method is responsible for this replacement\n- If the bug exists, the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key would still be used on Qt 6.4\n\"\"\"\n\nimport logging\nimport pytest\n\nfrom qutebrowser.config import configdata\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\n\n@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)\ndef patch_backend(monkeypatch):\n    monkeypatch.setattr(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine)\n\n\nQT_64_EXPECTED_SETTINGS = {\n    'blink-settings': [('forceDarkModeEnabled', 'true')],\n    'dark-mode-settings': [\n        ('InversionAlgorithm', '1'),\n        ('ImagePolicy', '2'),\n        ('IsGrayScale', 'true'),\n        ('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', '100'),  # This is the key change from Qt 6.3\n    ],\n}\n\nQT_63_EXPECTED_SETTINGS = {\n    'blink-settings': [('forceDarkModeEnabled', 'true')],\n    'dark-mode-settings': [\n        ('InversionAlgorithm', '1'),\n        ('ImagePolicy', '2'),\n        ('IsGrayScale', 'true'),\n        ('TextBrightnessThreshold', '100'),  # Qt 6.3 uses the old key\n    ],\n}\n\n\n@pytest.mark.parametrize('qversion, expected', [\n    ('6.3', QT_63_EXPECTED_SETTINGS),\n    ('6.4', QT_64_EXPECTED_SETTINGS),\n])\ndef test_darkmode_text_threshold_qt64_vs_qt63(config_stub, qversion, expected):\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold while Qt 6.3 uses TextBrightnessThreshold.\n    \n    This is a regression test for a bug where the Qt 6.4 dark mode text threshold\n    setting had no effect because copy_replace_setting() didn't properly replace\n    the key from 'TextBrightnessThreshold' to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Configure dark mode\n    settings = {\n        'enabled': True,\n        'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n        'grayscale.all': True,\n        'threshold.text': 100,\n    }\n    for k, v in settings.items():\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n    \n    # Get version and settings\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt(qversion)\n    darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    \n    # Verify the structure\n    assert darkmode_settings == expected, (\n        f\"Qt {qversion} dark mode settings mismatch.\\n\"\n        f\"Expected: {expected}\\n\"\n        f\"Got: {darkmode_settings}\\n\"\n        f\"Bug: If Qt 6.4 shows 'TextBrightnessThreshold' instead of \"\n        f\"'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', the copy_replace_setting() \"\n        f\"method failed to replace the key.\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_text_key_is_foreground(config_stub):\n    \"\"\"Directly test that Qt 6.4 threshold.text generates ForegroundBrightnessThreshold key.\"\"\"\n    config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 150)\n    \n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n    darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    \n    # Find the ForegroundBrightnessThreshold in the settings\n    dark_mode_list = darkmode_settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n    settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_list}\n    \n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n        f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key in Qt 6.4 settings, \"\n        f\"but got: {list(settings_dict.keys())}\"\n    )\n    assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n    \n    # Ensure the old key is NOT present\n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n        f\"Qt 6.4 should not have 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key. \"\n        f\"This indicates the bug: copy_replace_setting() didn't work.\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_threshold_text_key_is_text_brightness(config_stub):\n    \"\"\"Directly test that Qt 6.3 threshold.text still uses TextBrightnessThreshold key.\"\"\"\n    config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 150)\n    \n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n    darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    \n    # Find the TextBrightnessThreshold in the settings\n    dark_mode_list = darkmode_settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n    settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_list}\n    \n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n    assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n    \n    # Ensure the new key is NOT present on Qt 6.3\n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\nTESTEOF\n","description":"Write regression test in proper test directory"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":4,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4788,"cache_read_input_tokens":102311,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4788},"output_tokens":5,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"1ce1769d-60f8-4827-9bcf-7716dca74774"}

'TextBrightnessThreshold' key would still be used on Qt 6.4\n\"\"\"\n\nimport logging\nimport pytest\n\nfrom qutebrowser.config import configdata\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode","originalFile":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nTests that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting is \ncorrectly configured for Qt 6.4.\n\nBug Description:\n- Qt 6.4 renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n- The qutebrowser darkmode.py code needs to replace the key when Qt 6.4 is used\n- The copy_replace_setting() method is responsible for this replacement\n- If the bug exists, the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key would still be used on Qt 6.4\n\"\"\"\n\nimport logging\nimport pytest\n\nfrom qutebrowser.config import configdata\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\n\n@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)\ndef patch_backend(monkeypatch):\n    monkeypatch.setattr(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine)\n\n\nQT_64_EXPECTED_SETTINGS = {\n    'blink-settings': [('forceDarkModeEnabled', 'true')],\n    'dark-mode-settings': [\n        ('InversionAlgorithm', '1'),\n        ('ImagePolicy', '2'),\n        ('IsGrayScale', 'true'),\n        ('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', '100'),  # This is the key change from Qt 6.3\n    ],\n}\n\nQT_63_EXPECTED_SETTINGS = {\n    'blink-settings': [('forceDarkModeEnabled', 'true')],\n    'dark-mode-settings': [\n        ('InversionAlgorithm', '1'),\n        ('ImagePolicy', '2'),\n        ('IsGrayScale', 'true'),\n        ('TextBrightnessThreshold', '100'),  # Qt 6.3 uses the old key\n    ],\n}\n\n\n@pytest.mark.parametrize('qversion, expected', [\n    ('6.3', QT_63_EXPECTED_SETTINGS),\n    ('6.4', QT_64_EXPECTED_SETTINGS),\n])\ndef test_darkmode_text_threshold_qt64_vs_qt63(config_stub, qversion, expected):\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold while Qt 6.3 uses TextBrightnessThreshold.\n    \n    This is a regression test for a bug where the Qt 6.4 dark mode text threshold\n    setting had no effect because copy_replace_setting() didn't properly replace\n    the key from 'TextBrightnessThreshold' to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Configure dark mode\n    settings = {\n        'enabled': True,\n        'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n        'grayscale.all': True,\n        'threshold.text': 100,\n    }\n    for k, v in settings.items():\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n    \n    # Get version and settings\n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt(qversion)\n    darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    \n    # Verify the structure\n    assert darkmode_settings == expected, (\n        f\"Qt {qversion} dark mode settings mismatch.\\n\"\n        f\"Expected: {expected}\\n\"\n        f\"Got: {darkmode_settings}\\n\"\n        f\"Bug: If Qt 6.4 shows 'TextBrightnessThreshold' instead of \"\n        f\"'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', the copy_replace_setting() \"\n        f\"method failed to replace the key.\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt64_threshold_text_key_is_foreground(config_stub):\n    \"\"\"Directly test that Qt 6.4 threshold.text generates ForegroundBrightnessThreshold key.\"\"\"\n    config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 150)\n    \n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n    darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    \n    # Find the ForegroundBrightnessThreshold in the settings\n    dark_mode_list = darkmode_settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n    settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_list}\n    \n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict, (\n        f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' key in Qt 6.4 settings, \"\n        f\"but got: {list(settings_dict.keys())}\"\n    )\n    assert settings_dict['ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n    \n    # Ensure the old key is NOT present\n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict, (\n        f\"Qt 6.4 should not have 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key. \"\n        f\"This indicates the bug: copy_replace_setting() didn't work.\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_threshold_text_key_is_text_brightness(config_stub):\n    \"\"\"Directly test that Qt 6.3 threshold.text still uses TextBrightnessThreshold key.\"\"\"\n    config_stub.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text', 150)\n    \n    versions = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n    darkmode_settings = darkmode.settings(versions=versions, special_flags=[])\n    \n    # Find the TextBrightnessThreshold in the settings\n    dark_mode_list = darkmode_settings.get('dark-mode-settings', [])\n    settings_dict = {key: value for key, value in dark_mode_list}\n    \n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in settings_dict\n    assert settings_dict['TextBrightnessThreshold'] == '150'\n    \n    # Ensure the new key is NOT present on Qt 6.3\n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in settings_dict\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":6,"newStart":1,"newLines":6,"lines":[" \"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold
