{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01X8hDo922nwnJCTzoBjU38q","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014GTvm7LUkzPGTU8wnbmr6t","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/workspace/regression_test.py << 'TESTEOF' \n\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nTests that the dark mode text/foreground brightness threshold setting is \ncorrectly configured for Qt 6.4.\n\nBug Description:\n- Qt 6.4 renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n- The qutebrowser darkmode.py code should replace the key when Qt 6.4 is used\n- The copy_replace_setting() method is responsible for this replacement\n- If the bug exists, the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key would be used on Qt 6.4\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\n\n# Ensure we can import from /app\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\nimport pytest\n\n\ndef test_qt64_defines_foreground_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 definition should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold.\"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n    \n    # Get Qt 6.4 definition\n    definition_qt64 = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n    \n    # Find threshold.text setting\n    threshold_setting = None\n    for setting in definition_qt64._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            threshold_setting = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert threshold_setting is not None, \"threshold.text not found in Qt 6.4 definition\"\n    \n    # Check that the chromium key is ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n    assert threshold_setting.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', (\n        f\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' but got '{threshold_setting.chromium_key}'. \"\n        f\"Bug: copy_replace_setting() didn't replace the key correctly.\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_still_uses_text_brightness_threshold():\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.3 definition still uses TextBrightnessThreshold.\"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n    \n    # Get Qt 6.3 definition\n    definition_qt63 = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n    \n    # Find threshold.text setting\n    threshold_setting = None\n    for setting in definition_qt63._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            threshold_setting = setting\n            break\n    \n    assert threshold_setting is not None\n    assert threshold_setting.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold'\n\n\ndef test_qt64_and_qt63_keys_are_different():\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 and Qt 6.3 have different keys for threshold.text.\"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n    \n    # Get both definitions\n    def64 = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_64]\n    def63 = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[darkmode.Variant.qt_63]\n    \n    # Find threshold settings\n    th64 = None\n    th63 = None\n    for setting in def64._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            th64 = setting\n    for setting in def63._settings:\n        if setting.option == 'threshold.text':\n            th63 = setting\n    \n    assert th64 and th63, \"threshold.text not found\"\n    \n    # Keys must be different\n    assert th64.chromium_key != th63.chromium_key, (\n        f\"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 should have different keys for threshold.text. \"\n        f\"Qt 6.3: {th63.chromium_key}, Qt 6.4: {th64.chromium_key}. \"\n        f\"Bug: copy_replace_setting() failed to replace the key.\"\n    )\n    \n    # Check specific values\n    assert th63.chromium_key == 'TextBrightnessThreshold'\n    assert th64.chromium_key == 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'\n\n\ndef test_background_threshold_unchanged():\n    \"\"\"Test that background threshold key wasn't changed (only text threshold should change).\"\"\"\n    from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\n    \n    # Check both versions\n    for variant in [darkmode.Variant.qt_63, darkmode.Variant.qt_64]:\n        definition = darkmode._DEFINITIONS[variant]\n        \n        # Find background threshold\n        bg_threshold = None\n        for setting in definition._settings:\n            if setting.option == 'threshold.background':\n                bg_threshold = setting\n                break\n        \n        assert bg_threshold is not None\n        assert bg_threshold.chromium_key == 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\nTESTEOF\n","description":"Write standalone regression test"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1431,"cache_read_input_tokens":114773,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1431},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"47bfcaeb-7ae4-408a-ab2c-fe0ebff7b529"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_019oWPKctVZASzgA3J8KMQCZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01RM4EfZJyMa4jP5AN4ZGru2","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/regression_test.py << 'TESTEOF' \n\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test demonstrates the bug where the dark mode text brightness threshold\nsetting doesn't work correctly on Qt 6.4.\n\nBug: The Qt 6.4 Chromium variant renamed the 'TextBrightnessThreshold' property\nto 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', but qutebrowser's copy_replace_setting()\nmethod may not correctly replace it.\n\nThis test verifies the fix by checking that the settings() function produces\nthe correct Chromium configuration for both Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\n\n# Add app to path\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\nos.chdir('/app')\n\n# Initialize the config system\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config, configdata\nconfigdata.init(None)\n\nfrom unittest.mock import Mock, patch\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\nimport pytest\n\n\n@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)\ndef setup_config():\n    \"\"\"Setup config for testing.\"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config instance\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch the config instance\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            with patch.object(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine):\n                yield\n\n\ndef test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n    \n    This is a regression test for a bug where qutebrowser's darkmode.py failed to\n    update the threshold key for Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Test Qt 6.4\n            versions_64 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n            settings_64 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_64, special_flags=[])\n            \n            # Check that dark-mode-settings has ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n            dm_settings = dict(settings_64.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dm_settings, (\n                f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n                f\"Got keys: {list(dm_settings.keys())}. \"\n                f\"BUG: copy_replace_setting() didn't work - still using old key 'TextBrightnessThreshold'?\"\n            )\n            \n            assert dm_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold') == '100'\n            \n            # Ensure old key is NOT present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dm_settings, (\n                \"Bug: Qt 6.4 is using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_text_brightness_threshold_unchanged():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.3 should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Qt 6.4\n\nThis test demonstrates the bug where the dark mode text brightness threshold\nsetting doesn't work correctly on Qt 6.4.\n\nBug: The Qt 6.4 Chromium variant renamed the 'TextBrightnessThreshold' property\nto 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', but qutebrowser's copy_replace_setting()\nmethod may not correctly replace it.\n\nThis test verifies the fix by checking that the settings() function produces\nthe correct Chromium configuration for both Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\n\n# Add app to path\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\nos.chdir('/app')\n\n# Initialize the config system\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config, configdata\nconfigdata.init(None)\n\nfrom unittest.mock import Mock, patch\nfrom qutebrowser.utils \"\"\"Setup config for testing.\"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config instance\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine):\n                yield\n\n\ndef test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n    \n    This is a regression test for a bug where qutebrowser's darkmode.py failed to\n    update the threshold key for Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Test Qt 6.4\n            versions_64 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n            settings_64 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_64, \n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dm_settings, (\n                f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n                f\"Got keys: {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01T9Usw7XWpzRFPfYHsfVomy","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /app/regression_test.py has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"74de2a69-cc92-4c6b-b9ec-a3379e7f6cdc","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/app/regression_test.py","oldString":"# Import modules\nfrom unittest.mock import Mock, patch\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\nimport pytest","newString":"# Import modules\nfrom unittest.mock import Mock, patch\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\nimport pytest","originalFile":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test demonstrates the bug where the dark mode text brightness threshold\nsetting doesn't work correctly on Qt 6.4.\n\nBug: The Qt 6.4 Chromium variant renamed the 'TextBrightnessThreshold' property\nto 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', but qutebrowser's copy_replace_setting()\nmethod may not correctly replace it.\n\nThis test verifies the fix by checking that the settings() function produces\nthe correct Chromium configuration for both Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\n\n# Add app to path\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\nos.chdir('/app')\n\n# Import modules\nfrom unittest.mock import Mock, patch\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\nimport pytest\n\n\n@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)\ndef setup_config():\n    \"\"\"Setup config for testing.\"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config instance\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch the config instance\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            with patch.object(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine):\n                yield\n\n\ndef test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n    \n    This is a regression test for a bug where qutebrowser's darkmode.py failed to\n    update the threshold key for Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Test Qt 6.4\n            versions_64 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n            settings_64 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_64, special_flags=[])\n            \n            # Check that dark-mode-settings has ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n            dm_settings = dict(settings_64.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dm_settings, (\n                f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n                f\"Got keys: {list(dm_settings.keys())}. \"\n                f\"BUG: copy_replace_setting() didn't work - still using old key 'TextBrightnessThreshold'?\"\n            )\n            \n            assert dm_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold') == '100'\n            \n            # Ensure old key is NOT present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dm_settings, (\n                \"Bug: Qt 6.4 is using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_text_brightness_threshold_unchanged():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.3 should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Test Qt 6.3\n            versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n            settings_63 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_63, special_flags=[])\n            \n            # Check that dark-mode-settings has TextBrightnessThreshold\n            dm_settings = dict(settings_63.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dm_settings\n            assert dm_settings.get('TextBrightnessThreshold') == '100'\n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dm_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_vs_qt63_keys_differ():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 should have different keys for threshold.text.\"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Get settings for both versions\n            versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n            versions_64 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n            \n            settings_63 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_63, special_flags=[])\n            settings_64 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_64, special_flags=[])\n            \n            dm_63 = dict(settings_63.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            dm_64 = dict(settings_64.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            # The keys should be different\n            qt63_has_text_brightness = 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dm_63\n            qt64_has_foreground_brightness = 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dm_64\n            \n            assert qt63_has_text_brightness, \"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold\"\n            assert qt64_has_foreground_brightness, (\n                \"Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold. \"\n                \"Bug: copy_replace_setting() didn't replace the key.\"\n            )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":21,"oldLines":7,"newStart":21,"newLines":7,"lines":[" # Import modules"," from unittest.mock import Mock, patch"," from qutebrowser.config import config","-from qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes","+from qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes, utils"," from qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode"," from qutebrowser.misc import objects"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

Create a mock config instance\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch the config instance\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            with patch.object(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine):\n                yield\n\n\ndef test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():","newString":"def test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():","originalFile":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test demonstrates the bug where the dark mode text brightness threshold\nsetting doesn't work correctly on Qt 6.4.\n\nBug: The Qt 6.4 Chromium variant renamed the 'TextBrightnessThreshold' property\nto 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', but qutebrowser's copy_replace_setting()\nmethod may not correctly replace it.\n\nThis test verifies the fix by checking that the settings() function produces\nthe correct Chromium configuration for both Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\n\n# Add app to path\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\nos.chdir('/app')\n\n# Import modules\nfrom unittest.mock import Mock, patch\nfrom qutebrowser.config import config\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import version, usertypes, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\nimport pytest\n\n\n@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)\ndef setup_config():\n    \"\"\"Setup config for testing.\"\"\"\n    # Create a mock config instance\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch the config instance\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            with patch.object(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine):\n                yield\n\n\ndef test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\n    \n    This is a regression test for a bug where qutebrowser's darkmode.py failed to\n    update the threshold key for Qt 6.4.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Test Qt 6.4\n            versions_64 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n            settings_64 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_64, special_flags=[])\n            \n            # Check that dark-mode-settings has ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n            dm_settings = dict(settings_64.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dm_settings, (\n                f\"Expected 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in Qt 6.4 settings. \"\n                f\"Got keys: {list(dm_settings.keys())}. \"\n                f\"BUG: copy_replace_setting() didn't work - still using old key 'TextBrightnessThreshold'?\"\n            )\n            \n            assert dm_settings.get('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold') == '100'\n            \n            # Ensure old key is NOT present\n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' not in dm_settings, (\n                \"Bug: Qt 6.4 is using the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key\"\n            )\n\n\ndef test_qt63_text_brightness_threshold_unchanged():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.3 should still use 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.\"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Test Qt 6.3\n            versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n            settings_63 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_63, special_flags=[])\n            \n            # Check that dark-mode-settings has TextBrightnessThreshold\n            dm_settings = dict(settings_63.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dm_settings\n            assert dm_settings.get('TextBrightnessThreshold') == '100'\n            assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not in dm_settings\n\n\ndef test_qt64_vs_qt63_keys_differ():\n    \"\"\"Qt 6.3 and Qt 6.4 should have different keys for threshold.text.\"\"\"\n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET\n    \n    # Patch config\n    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):\n        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):\n            # Get settings for both versions\n            versions_63 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.3')\n            versions_64 = version.WebEngineVersions.from_pyqt('6.4')\n            \n            settings_63 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_63, special_flags=[])\n            settings_64 = darkmode.settings(versions=versions_64, special_flags=[])\n            \n            dm_63 = dict(settings_63.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            dm_64 = dict(settings_64.get('dark-mode-settings', []))\n            \n            # The keys should be different\n            qt63_has_text_brightness = 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in dm_63\n            qt64_has_foreground_brightness = 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in dm_64\n            \n            assert qt63_has_text_brightness, \"Qt 6.3 should have TextBrightnessThreshold\"\n            assert qt64_has_foreground_brightness, (\n                \"Qt 6.4 should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold. \"\n                \"Bug: copy_replace_setting() didn't replace the key.\"\n            )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":28,"oldLines":28,"newStart":28,"newLines":6,"lines":[" import pytest"," "," ","-@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)","-def setup_config():","-    \"\"\"Setup config for testing.\"\"\"","-    # Create a mock config instance","-    mock_config = Mock()","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False","-    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = usertypes.UNSET","-    ","-    # Patch the config instance","-    with patch.object(config, 'instance', mock_config):","-        with patch.object(config, 'val', mock_config.val):","-            with patch.object(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine):","-                yield","-","-"," def test_qt64_foreground_threshold_regression():","     \"\"\"Qt 6.4 should use 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' not 'TextBrightnessThreshold'.","     "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01YCor7St8EdyiomSWH1ZNS9","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01PMNeUZWVgPSaqHvvyeV6FA","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /app/tests/unit/browser/webengine/test_qt64_darkmode_regression.py << 'EOF'\n\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test is a regression test for the bug where the dark mode text brightness\nthreshold setting has no effect on Qt 6.4.\n\nBug: Chromium renamed the 'TextBrightnessThreshold' property to 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'\nin Qt 6.4, but qutebrowser's darkmode.py may not correctly apply this change.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport logging\nimport pytest\n\nfrom qutebrowser.config import configdata\nfrom qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, version, utils\nfrom qutebrowser.browser.webengine import darkmode\nfrom qutebrowser.misc import objects\n\n\n@pytest.fixture(autouse=True)\ndef patch_backend(monkeypatch):\n    monkeypatch.setattr(objects, 'backend', usertypes.Backend.QtWebEngine)\n\n\n# Test data for Qt 6.4: should have ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold\nQT_64_EXPECTED = {\n    'blink-settings': [('forceDarkModeEnabled', 'true')],\n    'dark-mode-settings': [\n        ('InversionAlgorithm', '1'),\n        ('ImagePolicy', '2'),\n        ('IsGrayScale', 'true'),\n        ('ForegroundBrightnessThreshold', '100'),  # This is the key - changed from TextBrightnessThreshold\n    ],\n}\n\n# Test data for Qt 6.3: still has TextBrightnessThreshold (baseline)\nQT_63_EXPECTED = {\n    'blink-settings': [('forceDarkModeEnabled', 'true')],\n    'dark-mode-settings': [\n        ('InversionAlgorithm', '1'),\n        ('ImagePolicy', '2'),\n        ('IsGrayScale', 'true'),\n        ('TextBrightnessThreshold', '100'),\n    ],\n}\n\n\n@pytest.mark.parametrize('qversion, expected', [\n    ('6.3', QT_63_EXPECTED),\n    ('6.4', QT_64_EXPECTED),\n])\ndef test_qt64_dark_mode_text_threshold_regression(config_stub, qversion, expected):\n    \"\"\"Regression test: Qt 6.4 must use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold, not TextBrightnessThreshold.\n    \n    When this bug exists, Qt 6.4 will incorrectly use the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key,\n    causing the text threshold setting to have no effect.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Configure dark mode\n    settings_dict = {\n        'enabled': True,\n        'algorithm': 'brightness-rgb',\n        'grayscale.all': True,\n        'threshold.text': 100,\n    }\n    for k, v in settings_dict.items():\n        config_stub.set_obj('colors.webpage.darkmode.' + k, v)\n    \n    # Create config\n    mock_config = Mock()\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm = 'brightness-rgb'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.grayscale.all = True\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.text = 100\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.threshold.background = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.contrast = 0\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images = 'smart'\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.increase_text_contrast = False\n    mock_config.val.colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme = None\n    \n    # The qutebrowser code uses copy_replace_setting()\nto make this change, but if that fails, the old key would still be used on Qt 6.4,\ncausing the text threshold setting to have no effect.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\nimport ast\n\ndef test_darkmode_py_has_qt64_replacement():\n    \"\"\"Verify that darkmode.py contains the code to replace the key for Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n    \n    # Check the specific line that creates qt_64 definition\n    assert (\"_DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_64] = \"\n            \"_DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_63].copy_replace_setting(\"\n            \"\\n    'threshold.text', 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold',\"\n            \"\\n)\") in content or (\n        \"_DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_64] = _DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_63].copy_replace_setting(\\n\"\n        \"    'threshold.text', 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold',\\n\"\n        \")\" in content), (\n        \"darkmode.py should have the correct copy_replace_setting call \"\n        \"to change TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_qt_515_3_and_qt_63_definitions_exist():\n    \"\"\"Verify that the baseline definitions exist.\"\"\"\n    darkmode_path = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_path, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    \n    # Check that Qt 5.15.3 and 6.3 definitions exist with TextBrightnessThreshold\n    assert 'Variant.qt_515_3' in content\n    assert 'Variant.qt_63' in content\n    assert 'TextBrightnessThreshold' in content\n\n\ndef test_copy_replace_setting_method_exists():\n    \"\"\"Verify that the copy_replace_setting method is properly defined.\"\"\"\n    darkmode_path = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_path, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    \n    # Find the method definition\n    assert 'def copy_replace_setting(self, option: str, chromium_key: str)' in content, (\n        \"copy_replace_setting method should be defined in _Definition class\"\n    )\n    \n    # Check that it modifies the chromium_key\n    assert 'setting.chromium_key = chromium_key' in content, (\n        \"copy_replace_setting should modify the chromium_key attribute\"\n    )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    import pytest\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\nTESTEOF\n","description":"Create simple structural test of darkmode.py"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":802,"cache_read_input_tokens":131382,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":802},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"334aa943-4771-48f0-be12-c675c7d23a60"}

\\n343: def _variant(versions: version.WebEngineVersions) -> Variant:\\n344:     \\\"\\\"\\\"Get the dark mode variant based on the underlying Qt version.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n345:     env_var = os.environ.get('QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT')\\n346:     if env_var is not None:\\n347:         try:\\n348:             return Variant[env_var]\\n349:         except KeyError:\\n350:             log.init.warning(f\\\"Ignoring invalid QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT={env_var}\\\")\\n351: \\n352:     if versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 4):\\n353:         return Variant.qt_64\\n354:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 3):\\n355:         return Variant.qt_63\\n356:     elif (versions.webengine == utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2) and\\n357:             versions.chromium_major == 87):\\n358:         # WORKAROUND for Gentoo packaging something newer as 5.15.2...\\n359:         return Variant.qt_515_3\\n360:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 3):\\n361:         return Variant.qt_515_3\\n362:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2):\\n363:         return Variant.qt_515_2\\n364:     raise utils.Unreachable(versions.webengine)\\n365: \\n366: \\n367: def settings(\\n368:         *,\\n369:         versions: version.WebEngineVersions,\\n370:         special_flags: Sequence[str],\\n371: ) -> Mapping[str, Sequence[Tuple[str, str]]]:\\n372:     \\\"\\\"\\\"Get necessary blink settings to configure dark mode for QtWebEngine.\\n373: \\n374:     Args:\\n375:        Existing '--blink-settings=...' flags, if any.\\n376: \\n377:     Returns:\\n378:         A dict which maps Chromium switch names (blink-settings or dark-mode-settings)\\n379:         to a sequence of tuples, each tuple being a key/value pair to pass to that\\n380:         setting.\\n381:     \\\"\\\"\\\"\\n382:     variant = _variant(versions)\\n383:     log.init.debug(f\\\"Darkmode variant: {variant.name}\\\")\\n384: \\n385:     result: Mapping[str, List[Tuple[str, str]]] = collections.defaultdict(list)\\n386: \\n387:     blink_settings_flag = f'--{_BLINK_SETTINGS}='\\n388:     for flag in special_flags:\\n389:         if flag.startswith(blink_settings_flag):\\n390:             for pair in flag[len(blink_settings_flag):].split(','):\\n391:                 key, val = pair.split('=', maxsplit=1)\\n392:                 result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((key, val))\\n393: \\n394:     preferred_color_scheme_key = config.instance.get(\\n395:         \\\"colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme\\\", fallback=False)\\n396:     preferred_color_scheme_defs = _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS[variant]\\n397:     if preferred_color_scheme_key in preferred_color_scheme_defs:\\n398:         value = preferred_color_scheme_defs[preferred_color_scheme_key]\\n399:         result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((\\\"preferredColorScheme\\\", value))\\n400: \\n401:     if not config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled:\\n402:         return result\\n403: \\n404:     definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]\\n405: \\n406:     for switch_name, setting in definition.prefixed_settings():\\n407:         # To avoid blowing up the commandline length, we only pass modified\\n408:         # settings to Chromium, as our defaults line up with Chromium's.\\n409:         # However, we always pass enabled/algorithm to make sure dark mode gets\\n410:         # actually turned on.\\n411:         value = config.instance.get(\\n412:             'colors.webpage.darkmode.' + setting.option,\\n413:             fallback=setting.option in definition.mandatory)\\n414:         if isinstance(value, usertypes.Unset):\\n415:             continue\\n416: \\n417:         result[switch_name].append(setting.chromium_tuple(value))\\n418: \\n419:     return result\\n420: \\n7: Overview of blink setting names based on the Qt version:\\n8: \\n9: Qt 5.10 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n10: ---------------------\\n11: \\n12: First implementation, called \\\"high contrast mode\\\".\\n13: \\n14: - highContrastMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness)\\n15: - highContrastGrayscale (bool)\\n16: - highContrastContrast (float)\\n17: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone)\\n18: \\n19: Qt 5.11, 5.12, 5.13 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n20: ---------------------------------\\n21: \\n22: New \\\"smart\\\" image policy.\\n23: \\n24: - Mode/Grayscale/Contrast as above\\n25: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart [new!])\\n26: \\n27: Qt 5.14 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n28: ---------------------\\n29: \\n30: Renamed to \\\"darkMode\\\".\\n31: \\n32: - darkMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness/\\n33:             kInvertLightnessLAB [new!])\\n34: - darkModeGrayscale (bool)\\n35: - darkModeContrast (float)\\n36: - darkModeImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart)\\n37: - darkModePagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterByBackground) [new!]\\n38: - darkModeTextBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\\n39: - darkModeBackgroundBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\\n40: - darkModeImageGrayscale (float) [new!]\\n41: \\n42: Qt 5.15.0 and 5.15.1 (UNSUPPORTED)\\n43: ----------------------------------\\n44: \\n45: \\\"darkMode\\\" split into \\\"darkModeEnabled\\\" and \\\"darkModeInversionAlgorithm\\\".\\n46: \\n47: - darkModeEnabled (bool) [new!]\\n48: - darkModeInversionAlgorithm (kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/\\n49:                                 kInvertLightness/kInvertLightnessLAB)\\n50: - Rest (except darkMode) as above.\\n51: - NOTE: smart image policy is broken with Qt 5.15.0!\\n52: \\n53: Qt 5.15.2\\n54: ---------\\n55: \\n56: Prefix changed to \\\"forceDarkMode\\\".\\n57: \\n58: - As with Qt 5.15.0 / .1, but with \\\"forceDarkMode\\\" as prefix.\\n59: \\n60: Qt 5.15.3\\n61: ---------\\n62: \\n63: Settings split to new --dark-mode-settings switch:\\n64: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2390588\\n65: \\n66: - Everything except forceDarkModeEnabled goes to the other switch.\\n67: - Algorithm uses a different enum with kOff gone.\\n68: - No \\\"forceDarkMode\\\" prefix anymore.\\n69: \\n70: Removed DarkModePagePolicy:\\n71: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2323441\\n72: \\n73: \\\"prefers color scheme dark\\\" changed enum values:\\n74: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2232922\\n75: \\n76: - Now needs to be 0 for dark and 1 for light\\n77:   (before: 0 no preference / 1 dark / 2 light)\\n78: \\n79: Qt 6.2\\n80: ------\\n81: \\n82: No significant changes over 5.15.3\\n83: \\n84: Qt 6.3\\n85: ------\\n86: \\n87: - New IncreaseTextContrast:\\n88: # SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Florian Bruhin (The Compiler) <mail@qutebrowser.org>\n2: #\n3: # SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-or-later\n4: \n5: \"\"\"Get darkmode arguments to pass to Qt.\n6: \n7: Overview of blink setting names based on the Qt version:\n8: \n9: Qt 5.10 (UNSUPPORTED)\n10: ---------------------\n11: \n12: First implementation, called \"high contrast mode\".\n13: \n14: - highContrastMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness)\n15: - highContrastGrayscale (bool)\n16: - highContrastContrast (float)\n17: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone)\n18: \n19: Qt 5.11, 5.12, 5.13 (UNSUPPORTED)\n20: ---------------------------------\n21: \n22: New \"smart\" image policy.\n23: \n24: - Mode/Grayscale/Contrast as above\n25: - highContractImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart [new!])\n26: \n27: Qt 5.14 (UNSUPPORTED)\n28: ---------------------\n29: \n30: Renamed to \"darkMode\".\n31: \n32: - darkMode (kOff/kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/kInvertLightness/\n33:             kInvertLightnessLAB [new!])\n34: - darkModeGrayscale (bool)\n35: - darkModeContrast (float)\n36: - darkModeImagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterNone/kFilterSmart)\n37: - darkModePagePolicy (kFilterAll/kFilterByBackground) [new!]\n38: - darkModeTextBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\n39: - darkModeBackgroundBrightnessThreshold (int) [new!]\n40: - darkModeImageGrayscale (float) [new!]\n41: \n42: Qt 5.15.0 and 5.15.1 (UNSUPPORTED)\n43: ----------------------------------\n44: \n45: \"darkMode\" split into \"darkModeEnabled\" and \"darkModeInversionAlgorithm\".\n46: \n47: - darkModeEnabled (bool) [new!]\n48: - darkModeInversionAlgorithm (kSimpleInvertForTesting/kInvertBrightness/\n49:                                 kInvertLightness/kInvertLightnessLAB)\n50: - Rest (except darkMode) as above.\n51: - NOTE: smart image policy is broken with Qt 5.15.0!\n52: \n53: Qt 5.15.2\n54: ---------\n55: \n56: Prefix changed to \"forceDarkMode\".\n57: \n58: - As with Qt 5.15.0 / .1, but with \"forceDarkMode\" as prefix.\n59: \n60: Qt 5.15.3\n61: ---------\n62: \n63: Settings split to new --dark-mode-settings switch:\n64: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2390588\n65: \n66: - Everything except forceDarkModeEnabled goes to the other switch.\n67: - Algorithm uses a different enum with kOff gone.\n68: - No \"forceDarkMode\" prefix anymore.\n69: \n70: Removed DarkModePagePolicy:\n71: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2323441\n72: \n73: \"prefers color scheme dark\" changed enum values:\n74: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2232922\n75: \n76: - Now needs to be 0 for dark and 1 for light\n77:   (before: 0 no preference / 1 dark / 2 light)\n78: \n79: Qt 6.2\n80: ------\n81: \n82: No significant changes over 5.15.3\n83: \n84: Qt 6.3\n85: ------\n86: \n87: - New IncreaseTextContrast:\n88: https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/2893236\n89: \n90: Qt 6.4\n91: ------\n92: \n93: - Renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n94: \n95:   \"Correct brightness threshold of darkmode color classifier\"\n96:   https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3344100\n97: \n98:   \"Rename text_classifier to foreground_classifier\"\n99:   https://chromium-review.googlesource.com/c/chromium/src/+/3226389\n100: \"\"\"\n101: \n102: import os\n103: import copy\n104: import enum\n105: import dataclasses\n106: import collections\n107: from typing import (Any, Iterator, Mapping, MutableMapping, Optional, Set, Tuple, Union,\n108:                     Sequence, List)\n109: \n110: from qutebrowser.config import config\n111: from qutebrowser.utils import usertypes, utils, log, version\n112: \n113: \n114: _BLINK_SETTINGS = 'blink-settings'\n115: \n116: \n117: class Variant(enum.Enum):\n118: \n119:     \"\"\"A dark mode variant.\"\"\"\n120: \n121:     qt_515_2 = enum.auto()\n122:     qt_515_3 = enum.auto()\n123:     qt_63 = enum.auto()\n124:     qt_64 = enum.auto()\n125: \n126: \n127: # Mapping from a colors.webpage.darkmode.algorithm setting value to\n128: # Chromium's DarkModeInversionAlgorithm enum values.\n129: _ALGORITHMS = {\n130:     # 0: kOff (not exposed)\n131:     # 1: kSimpleInvertForTesting (not exposed)\n132:     'brightness-rgb': 2,  # kInvertBrightness\n133:     'lightness-hsl': 3,  # kInvertLightness\n134:     'lightness-cielab': 4,  # kInvertLightnessLAB\n135: }\n136: # Qt >= 5.15.3, based on dark_mode_settings.h\n137: _ALGORITHMS_NEW = {\n138:     # 0: kSimpleInvertForTesting (not exposed)\n139:     'brightness-rgb': 1,  # kInvertBrightness\n140:     'lightness-hsl': 2,  # kInvertLightness\n141:     'lightness-cielab': 3,  # kInvertLightnessLAB\n142: }\n143: \n144: # Mapping from a colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.images setting value to\n145: # Chromium's DarkModeImagePolicy enum values.\n146: # Values line up with dark_mode_settings.h for 5.15.3+.\n147: _IMAGE_POLICIES = {\n148:     'always': 0,  # kFilterAll\n149:     'never': 1,  # kFilterNone\n150:     'smart': 2,  # kFilterSmart\n151: }\n152: \n153: # Mapping from a colors.webpage.darkmode.policy.page setting value to\n154: # Chromium's DarkModePagePolicy enum values.\n155: _PAGE_POLICIES = {\n156:     'always': 0,  # kFilterAll\n157:     'smart': 1,  # kFilterByBackground\n158: }\n159: \n160: _BOOLS = {\n161:     True: 'true',\n162:     False: 'false',\n163: }\n164: \n165: _INT_BOOLS = {\n166:     True: '1',\n167:     False: '0',\n168: }\n169: \n170: \n171: @dataclasses.dataclass\n172: class _Setting:\n173: \n174:     \"\"\"A single dark mode setting.\"\"\"\n175: \n176:     option: str\n177:     chromium_key: str\n178:     mapping: Optional[Mapping[Any, Union[str, int]]] = None\n179: \n180:     def _value_str(self, value: Any) -> str:\n181:         if self.mapping is None:\n182:             return str(value)\n183:         return str(self.mapping[value])\n184: \n185:     def chromium_tuple(self, value: Any) -> Tuple[str, str]:\n186:         return self.chromium_key, self._value_str(value)\n187: \n188:     def with_prefix(self, prefix: str) -> '_Setting':\n189:         return _Setting(\n190:             option=self.option,\n191:             chromium_key=prefix + self.chromium_key,\n192:             mapping=self.mapping,\n193:         )\n194: \n195: \n196: class _Definition:\n197: \n198:     \"\"\"A collection of dark mode setting names for the given QtWebEngine version.\n199: \n200:     Attributes:\n201:         _settings: A list of _Setting objects for this definition.\n202:         mandatory: A set of settings which should always be passed to Chromium, even if\n203:                    not customized from the default.\n204:         prefix: A string prefix to add to all Chromium setting names.\n205:         switch_names: A dict mapping option names to the Chromium switch they belong to.\n206:                       None is used as fallback key, i.e. for settings not in the dict.\n207:     \"\"\"\n208: \n209:     def __init__(\n210:             self,\n211:             *args: _Setting,\n212:             mandatory: Set[str],\n213:             prefix: str,\n214:             switch_names: Mapping[Optional[str], str] = None,\n215:     ) -> None:\n216:         self._settings = args\n217:         self.mandatory = mandatory\n218:         self.prefix = prefix\n219: \n220:         if switch_names is not None:\n221:             self._switch_names = switch_names\n222:         else:\n223:             self._switch_names = {None: _BLINK_SETTINGS}\n224: \n225:     def prefixed_settings(self) -> Iterator[Tuple[str, _Setting]]:\n226:         \"\"\"Get all \"prepared\" settings.\n227: \n228:         Yields tuples which contain the Chromium setting key (e.g. 'blink-settings' or\n229:         'dark-mode-settings') and the corresponding _Settings object.\n230:         \"\"\"\n231:         for setting in self._settings:\n232:             switch = self._switch_names.get(setting.option, self._switch_names[None])\n233:             yield switch, setting.with_prefix(self.prefix)\n234: \n235:     def copy_with(self, attr: str, value: Any) -> '_Definition':\n236:         \"\"\"Get a new _Definition object with a changed attribute.\n237: \n238:         NOTE: This does *not* copy the settings list. Both objects will reference the\n239:         same (immutable) tuple.\n240:         \"\"\"\n241:         new = copy.copy(self)\n242:         setattr(new, attr, value)\n243:         return new\n244: \n245:     def copy_add_setting(self, setting: _Setting) -> '_Definition':\n246:         \"\"\"Get a new _Definition object with an additional setting.\"\"\"\n247:         new = copy.copy(self)\n248:         new._settings = self._settings + (setting,)  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n249:         return new\n250: \n251:     def copy_replace_setting(self, option: str, chromium_key: str) -> '_Definition':\n252:         \"\"\"Get a new _Definition object with `old` replaced by `new`.\n253: \n254:         If `old` is not in the settings list, return the old _Definition object.\n255:         \"\"\"\n256:         new = copy.deepcopy(self)\n257: \n258:         for setting in new._settings:  # pylint: disable=protected-access\n259:             if setting.option == option:\n260:                 setting.chromium_key = chromium_key\n261:                 return new\n262: \n263:         raise ValueError(f\"Setting {option} not found in {self}\")\n264: \n265: \n266: # Our defaults for policy.images are different from Chromium's, so we mark it as\n267: # mandatory setting.\n268: \n269: _DEFINITIONS: MutableMapping[Variant, _Definition] = {\n270:     Variant.qt_515_2: _Definition(\n271:         _Setting('enabled', 'Enabled', _BOOLS),\n272:         _Setting('algorithm', 'InversionAlgorithm', _ALGORITHMS),\n273: \n274:         _Setting('policy.images', 'ImagePolicy', _IMAGE_POLICIES),\n275:         _Setting('contrast', 'Contrast'),\n276:         _Setting('grayscale.all', 'Grayscale', _BOOLS),\n277: \n278:         _Setting('policy.page', 'PagePolicy', _PAGE_POLICIES),\n279:         _Setting('threshold.text', 'TextBrightnessThreshold'),\n280:         _Setting('threshold.background', 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'),\n281:         _Setting('grayscale.images', 'ImageGrayscale'),\n282: \n283:         mandatory={'enabled', 'policy.images'},\n284:         prefix='forceDarkMode',\n285:     ),\n286: \n287:     Variant.qt_515_3: _Definition(\n288:         # Different switch for settings\n289:         _Setting('enabled', 'forceDarkModeEnabled', _BOOLS),\n290:         _Setting('algorithm', 'InversionAlgorithm', _ALGORITHMS_NEW),\n291: \n292:         _Setting('policy.images', 'ImagePolicy', _IMAGE_POLICIES),\n293:         _Setting('contrast', 'ContrastPercent'),\n294:         _Setting('grayscale.all', 'IsGrayScale', _BOOLS),\n295: \n296:         _Setting('threshold.text', 'TextBrightnessThreshold'),\n297:         _Setting('threshold.background', 'BackgroundBrightnessThreshold'),\n298:         _Setting('grayscale.images', 'ImageGrayScalePercent'),\n299: \n300:         mandatory={'enabled', 'policy.images'},\n301:         prefix='',\n302:         switch_names={'enabled': _BLINK_SETTINGS, None: 'dark-mode-settings'},\n303:     ),\n304: }\n305: _DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_63] = _DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_515_3].copy_add_setting(\n306:     _Setting('increase_text_contrast', 'IncreaseTextContrast', _INT_BOOLS),\n307: )\n308: _DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_64] = _DEFINITIONS[Variant.qt_63].copy_replace_setting(\n309:     'threshold.text', 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold',\n310: )\n311: \n312: \n313: _SettingValType = Union[str, usertypes.Unset]\n314: _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS: Mapping[Variant, Mapping[_SettingValType, str]] = {\n315:     Variant.qt_515_2: {\n316:         # 0: no-preference (not exposed)\n317:         \"dark\": \"1\",\n318:         \"light\": \"2\",\n319:         # WORKAROUND for https://bugreports.qt.io/browse/QTBUG-89753\n320:         # Fall back to \"light\" instead of \"no preference\" (which was removed from the\n321:         # standard)\n322:         \"auto\": \"2\",\n323:         usertypes.UNSET: \"2\",\n324:     },\n325: \n326:     Variant.qt_515_3: {\n327:         \"dark\": \"0\",\n328:         \"light\": \"1\",\n329:     },\n330: \n331:     Variant.qt_63: {\n332:         \"dark\": \"0\",\n333:         \"light\": \"1\",\n334:     },\n335: \n336:     Variant.qt_64: {\n337:         \"dark\": \"0\",\n338:         \"light\": \"1\",\n339:     }\n340: }\n341: \n342: \n343: def _variant(versions: version.WebEngineVersions) -> Variant:\n344:     \"\"\"Get the dark mode variant based on the underlying Qt version.\"\"\"\n345:     env_var = os.environ.get('QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT')\n346:     if env_var is not None:\n347:         try:\n348:             return Variant[env_var]\n349:         except KeyError:\n350:             log.init.warning(f\"Ignoring invalid QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT={env_var}\")\n351: \n352:     if versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 4):\n353:         return Variant.qt_64\n354:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 3):\n355:         return Variant.qt_63\n356:     elif (versions.webengine == utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2) and\n357:             versions.chromium_major == 87):\n358:         # WORKAROUND for Gentoo packaging something newer as 5.15.2...\n359:         return Variant.qt_515_3\n360:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 3):\n361:         return Variant.qt_515_3\n362:     elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2):\n363:         return Variant.qt_515_2\n364:     raise utils.Unreachable(versions.webengine)\n365: \n366: \n367: def settings(\n368:         *,\n369:         versions: version.WebEngineVersions,\n370:         special_flags: Sequence[str],\n371: ) -> Mapping[str, Sequence[Tuple[str, str]]]:\n372:     \"\"\"Get necessary blink settings to configure dark mode for QtWebEngine.\n373: \n374:     Args:\n375:        Existing '--blink-settings=...' flags, if any.\n376: \n377:     Returns:\n378:         A dict which maps Chromium switch names (blink-settings or dark-mode-settings)\n379:         to a sequence of tuples, each tuple being a key/value pair to pass to that\n380:         setting.\n381:     \"\"\"\n382:     variant = _variant(versions)\n383:     log.init.debug(f\"Darkmode variant: {variant.name}\")\n384: \n385:     result: Mapping[str, List[Tuple[str, str]]] = collections.defaultdict(list)\n386: \n387:     blink_settings_flag = f'--{_BLINK_SETTINGS}='\n388:     for flag in special_flags:\n389:         if flag.startswith(blink_settings_flag):\n390:             for pair in flag[len(blink_settings_flag):].split(','):\n391: \"colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme\", fallback=False)\n396:     preferred_color_scheme_defs = _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS[variant]\n397:     if preferred_color_scheme_key in preferred_color_scheme_defs:\n398:         value = preferred_color_scheme_defs[preferred_color_scheme_key]\n399:         result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((\"preferredColorScheme\", value))\n400: \n401:     if not config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled:\n402:         return result\n403: \n404:     definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]\n405: \n406:     for switch_name, setting in 'colors.webpage.darkmode.' + setting.option,\n413:             fallback=setting.option in definition.mandatory)\n414:         if isinstance(value, usertypes.Unset):\n415:             continue\n416: 'smart': 1,  # kFilterByBackground\n}\n\n_BOOLS = {\n    True: 'true',\n    False: 'false',\n}\n\n_INT_BOOLS = {\n    True: '1',\n    False: '0',\n}\n\n\n@dataclasses.dataclass\nclass _Setting:\n\n 0: no-preference (not exposed)\n        \"dark\": \"1\",\n        \"light\": \"2\",\n        # WORKAROUND for https://bugreports.qt.io/browse/QTBUG-89753\n        # Fall back to \"light\" instead of \"no preference\" (which was removed from the\n        # standard)\n        \"auto\": \"2\",\n        usertypes.UNSET: \"2\",\n    },\n\n    Variant.qt_515_3: {\n        \"dark\": \"0\",\n        \"light\": \"1\",\n    },\n\n    Variant.qt_63: {\n        \"dark\": \"0\",\n        \"light\": \"1\",\n    },\n\n    Variant.qt_64: {\n        \"dark\": \"0\",\n        \"light\": \"1\",\n    }\n}\n\n\ndef _variant(versions: version.WebEngineVersions) -> Variant:\n    \"\"\"Get the dark mode variant based on the underlying Qt version.\"\"\"\n    env_var = os.environ.get('QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT')\n    if env_var is not None:\n        try:\n            return Variant[env_var]\n        except KeyError:\n            log.init.warning(f\"Ignoring invalid QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT={env_var}\")\n\n    if versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 4):\n        return Variant.qt_64\n    elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 3):\n        return Variant.qt_63\n    elif (versions.webengine == utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2) and\n            versions.chromium_major == 87):\n        # WORKAROUND for Gentoo packaging something newer as 5.15.2...\n        return Variant.qt_515_3\n    elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 3):\n        return Variant.qt_515_3\n    elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2):\n        return Variant.qt_515_2\n    raise utils.Unreachable(versions.webengine)\n\n\ndef settings(\n        *,\n        versions: version.WebEngineVersions,\n        special_flags: Sequence[str],\n) -> Mapping[str, Sequence[Tuple[str, str]]]:\n    \"\"\"Get necessary blink settings to configure dark mode for QtWebEngine.\n\n    Args:\n       Existing '--blink-settings=...' flags, if any.\n\n    Returns:\n        A dict which maps Chromium switch names (blink-settings or dark-mode-settings)\n        to a sequence of tuples, each tuple being a key/value pair to pass to that\n        setting.\n    \"\"\"\n    variant = _variant(versions)\n    log.init.debug(f\"Darkmode variant: {variant.name}\")\n\n    result: Mapping[str, List[Tuple[str, str]]] = collections.defaultdict(list)\n\n    blink_settings_flag = f'--{_BLINK_SETTINGS}='\n    for flag in special_flags:\n        if flag.startswith(blink_settings_flag):\n            for pair in flag[len(blink_settings_flag):].split(','):\n                key, val = pair.split('=', maxsplit=1)\n                result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((key, val))\n\n    preferred_color_scheme_key = config.instance.get(\n        \"colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme\", fallback=False)\n    preferred_color_scheme_defs = _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS[variant]\n    if preferred_color_scheme_key in preferred_color_scheme_defs:\n        value = preferred_color_scheme_defs[preferred_color_scheme_key]\n        result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((\"preferredColorScheme\", value))\n\n    if not config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled:\n        return result\n\n    definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]\n\n    for switch_name, setting in definition.prefixed_settings():\n        # actually turned on.\n        value = config.instance.get(\n            'colors.webpage.darkmode.' + setting.option,\n            fallback=setting.option in definition.mandatory)\n        if isinstance(value, usertypes.Unset):\n            continue\n\n        result[switch_name].append(setting.chromium_tuple(value))\n\n    return result\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5955,"cache_read_input_tokens":137914,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":5955},"output_tokens":3,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"596d225a-bda8-4435-b813-f10f38b13445"}

0: no-preference (not exposed)\n        \"dark\": \"1\",\n        \"light\": \"2\",\n        # WORKAROUND for https://bugreports.qt.io/browse/QTBUG-89753\n        # Fall back to \"light\" instead of \"no preference\" (which was removed from the\n        # standard)\n        \"auto\": \"2\",\n        usertypes.UNSET: \"2\",\n    },\n\n    Variant.qt_515_3: {\n        \"dark\": \"0\",\n        \"light\": \"1\",\n    },\n\n    Variant.qt_63: {\n        \"dark\": \"0\",\n        \"light\": \"1\",\n    },\n\n    Variant.qt_64: {\n        \"dark\": \"0\",\n        \"light\": \"1\",\n    }\n}\n\n\ndef _variant(versions: version.WebEngineVersions) -> Variant:\n    \"\"\"Get the dark mode variant based on the underlying Qt version.\"\"\"\n    env_var = os.environ.get('QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT')\n    if env_var is not None:\n        try:\n            return Variant[env_var]\n        except KeyError:\n            log.init.warning(f\"Ignoring invalid QUTE_DARKMODE_VARIANT={env_var}\")\n\n    if versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 4):\n        return Variant.qt_64\n    elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(6, 3):\n        return Variant.qt_63\n    elif (versions.webengine == utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2) and\n            versions.chromium_major == 87):\n        # WORKAROUND for Gentoo packaging something newer as 5.15.2...\n        return Variant.qt_515_3\n    elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 3):\n        return Variant.qt_515_3\n    elif versions.webengine >= utils.VersionNumber(5, 15, 2):\n        return Variant.qt_515_2\n    raise utils.Unreachable(versions.webengine)\n\n\ndef settings(\n        *,\n        versions: version.WebEngineVersions,\n        special_flags: Sequence[str],\n) -> Mapping[str, Sequence[Tuple[str, str]]]:\n    \"\"\"Get necessary blink settings to configure dark mode for QtWebEngine.\n\n    Args:\n       Existing '--blink-settings=...' flags, if any.\n\n    Returns:\n        A dict which maps Chromium switch names (blink-settings or dark-mode-settings)\n        to a sequence of tuples, each tuple being a key/value pair to pass to that\n        setting.\n    \"\"\"\n    variant = _variant(versions)\n    log.init.debug(f\"Darkmode variant: {variant.name}\")\n\n    result: Mapping[str, List[Tuple[str, str]]] = collections.defaultdict(list)\n\n    blink_settings_flag = f'--{_BLINK_SETTINGS}='\n    for flag in special_flags:\n        if flag.startswith(blink_settings_flag):\n            for pair in flag[len(blink_settings_flag):].split(','):\n                key, val = pair.split('=', maxsplit=1)\n                result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((key, val))\n\n    preferred_color_scheme_key = config.instance.get(\n        \"colors.webpage.preferred_color_scheme\", fallback=False)\n    preferred_color_scheme_defs = _PREFERRED_COLOR_SCHEME_DEFINITIONS[variant]\n    if preferred_color_scheme_key in preferred_color_scheme_defs:\n        value = preferred_color_scheme_defs[preferred_color_scheme_key]\n        result[_BLINK_SETTINGS].append((\"preferredColorScheme\", value))\n\n    if not config.val.colors.webpage.darkmode.enabled:\n        return result\n\n    definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]\n\n    for switch_name, setting in definition.prefixed_settings():\n        # To avoid blowing up the commandline length, we only pass modified\n        # settings to Chromium, as our defaults line up with Chromium's.\n        # However, we always pass enabled/algorithm to make sure dark mode gets\n        # actually turned on.\n        value = config.instance.get(\n            'colors.webpage.darkmode.' + setting.option,\n            fallback=setting.option in definition.mandatory)\n        if isinstance(value, usertypes.Unset):\n            continue\n\n        result[switch_name].append(setting.chromium_tuple(value))\n\n    return result\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","id":"msg_01F3naoUX92viK1AVcqQPAny","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_0146cceBKYr5gAWLdVnbjc2M","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/regression_test.py","content":"\"\"\"Regression test for Dark Mode Text Threshold Setting Bug on Qt 6.4\n\nThis test verifies that qutebrowser correctly applies the text brightness threshold\nsetting on Qt 6.4. In Qt 6.4, Chromium renamed the setting from 'TextBrightnessThreshold'\nto 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'.\n\nBug Description:\n- Qt 6.4 renamed TextBrightnessThreshold to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\n- The qutebrowser code uses copy_replace_setting() method to handle this change\n- If the bug exists, the old 'TextBrightnessThreshold' key would still be used on Qt 6.4\n- This would cause the text threshold setting to have no effect\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\n\n# Ensure /app is in path for imports\nsys.path.insert(0, '/app')\n\n\ndef test_qt64_darkmode_definition_uses_foreground_threshold():\n    \"\"\"Test that Qt 6.4 definition uses ForegroundBrightnessThreshold.\"\"\"\n    # Read the source code to verify the replacement is in place\n    darkmode_file = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_file, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n\n    # Check that Qt 6.4 is defined\n    assert 'Variant.qt_64' in content, (\n        \"Qt 6.4 variant should be defined\"\n    )\n\n    # Check that ForegroundBrightnessThreshold is referenced (for Qt 6.4)\n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in content, (\n        \"Qt 6.4 should use ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\"\n    )\n\n    # Check that the copy_replace_setting call is present for Qt 6.4\n    assert (\"copy_replace_setting(\"\n            \"\\n    'threshold.text', 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold'\") in content or (\n        \"copy_replace_setting(\\n    'threshold.text', 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold',\" in content), (\n        \"Should have copy_replace_setting call to change threshold.text to ForegroundBrightnessThreshold\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_darkmode_settings_function_structure():\n    \"\"\"Test that the settings() function is properly structured.\"\"\"\n    darkmode_file = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_file, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n\n    # Check that _DEFINITIONS mapping exists\n    assert '_DEFINITIONS:' in content or '_DEFINITIONS =' in content, (\n        \"_DEFINITIONS should be defined\"\n    )\n\n    # Check that settings() function exists\n    assert 'def settings(' in content, (\n        \"settings() function should be defined\"\n    )\n\n    # Check that the function uses _DEFINITIONS\n    assert 'definition = _DEFINITIONS[variant]' in content, (\n        \"settings() should look up the definition using variant\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_copy_replace_setting_method_exists():\n    \"\"\"Test that copy_replace_setting method is defined.\"\"\"\n    darkmode_file = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_file, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n\n    # Check that the method is defined\n    assert 'def copy_replace_setting(' in content, (\n        \"copy_replace_setting method should be defined in _Definition class\"\n    )\n\n    # Check that it modifies chromium_key\n    assert 'setting.chromium_key = chromium_key' in content, (\n        \"copy_replace_setting should modify the chromium_key attribute\"\n    )\n\n\ndef test_variant_enum_has_qt64():\n    \"\"\"Test that Variant enum includes qt_64.\"\"\"\n    darkmode_file = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_file, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n\n    # Look for the Variant enum definition\n    assert 'class Variant(enum.Enum):' in content, (\n        \"Variant enum should be defined\"\n    )\n\n    # Check that qt_64 is in the enum\n    assert 'qt_64 = enum.auto()' in content, (\n        \"Variant enum should have qt_64 member\"\n    )\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    import pytest\n    pytest.main([__file__, '-v', '--tb=short'])\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4521,"cache_read_input_tokens":143869,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4521},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"9092023b-7530-4c27-8820-d6d03f19866d","uuid":"2da14ec1-6ff4-4a22-bd41-74febafb7076"}

The qutebrowser code uses copy_replace_setting()\nto make this change, but if that fails, the old key would still be used on Qt 6.4,\ncausing the text threshold setting to have no effect.\n\"\"\"\n\nimport sys\nimport os\nimport ast\n\ndef test_darkmode_py_has_qt64_replacement():\n    \"\"\"Verify that darkmode.py contains the code to replace the key for Qt 6.4.\"\"\"\n    \n    # Read the darkmode.py file\n    darkmode_path = '/app/qutebrowser/browser/webengine/darkmode.py'\n    with open(darkmode_path, 'r') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n    \n    # Check that the file contains the replacement code for Qt 6.4\n    assert 'Variant.qt_64' in content, (\n        \"darkmode.py should define Variant.qt_64\"\n    )\n    \n    assert 'copy_replace_setting' in content, (\n        \"darkmode.py should use copy_replace_setting method\"\n    )\n    \n    assert 'ForegroundBrightnessThreshold' in content, (\n        \"darkmode.py should reference ForegroundBrightnessThreshold for Qt 6.4\"\n    )\n    \n    #
